title: filago contracta
intro: Filago contracta, also known as lesser celandine or pilewort, is a perennial plant with yellow flowers and heart-shaped leaves that grows in moist environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Its health benefits are said to include treating digestive issues, reducing swelling, and soothing skin irritations, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. In herbal preparations, filago contracta is often combined with other plants to make teas, tinctures, or salves that can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health concerns.
